What We Do

Our Services

From small yard cleanups to complete property transformations — we handle it all with the same level of care and professionalism.

🏗️

Fencing & Gates

Custom wood, cedar, and chain-link fence installation and repair. Privacy fences, gates, and decorative options.

🌿

Landscaping Design

Complete landscape design and installation. Transform your outdoor space with professional planning and execution.

🧱

Hardscaping

Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and decorative stone work. Built to last with premium materials.

🌲

Tree & Shrub Care

Professional pruning, trimming, and removal. Keep your trees healthy and your property safe.

🍂

Yard Cleanup

Seasonal cleanups, debris removal, mulch installation, and complete property restoration.

🏠

Property Maintenance

Regular maintenance programs for residential and commercial properties. Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly.

Get a Free Quote Today →

About Us

Built on Integrity,
Driven by Results

The Eagle Landscaping and Construction is your trusted partner for all outdoor projects in the Everett, WA area. Led by owner Anthony, we've built our reputation on honest communication, fair pricing, and exceptional craftsmanship.

Whether you need a new fence installed, a complete landscape redesign, or regular property maintenance — we treat every project like it's our own home. That's why our clients keep coming back and recommending us to their neighbors.

EAGLEL*829CB

WA License #

Everett

Based & Serving

Why Choose The Eagle?

  • ✓Owner on every job — Anthony personally oversees all work
  • ✓Honest estimates — no surprise charges or hidden fees
  • ✓Available 24/7 — we work around your schedule
  • ✓Licensed, bonded & insured for your protection
  • ✓Clean job sites — we leave your property spotless
  • ✓Photo documentation of every project

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

★★★★★

23 reviews on Yelp • 5.0 average rating

★★★★★

“I cannot recommend Anthony enough! Our sad, dilapidated fence was in dire need of replacement and we were so nervous to hire someone. Immediately upon meeting Anthony, we felt so at ease and knew we were in good hands.”

— Happy Customer

via Yelp

★★★★★

“Rather than ignoring issues, Anthony evaluated solutions and in the end suggested we change our landscape plan. His honesty and expertise saved us money and delivered a better result.”

— Satisfied Homeowner

via Yelp

★★★★★

“Consistent fair price and quality work. He came out the next day to scope the work, was clear in his communication, and did a wonderful job installing the new fence.”

— Repeat Client

via Yelp

★★★★★

“We then added a huge wrap around patio and pathway. Anthony and his crew were professional, on time, and the finished product exceeded our expectations.”

— Delighted Neighbor

via Yelp
